name: code-toolkit
description: Process-discipline + canon-grounded coding workflow for Claude Code (+ Codex CLI manifest in lock-step). 11 skills + 4 plugin-level subagents enforce TDD / brainstorming / SDD / parallel-dispatch / code review. Grounded in Beck / Martin / Fowler / Feathers / OWASP / 徳丸本.

interface.shortDescription: Process-discipline + canon-grounded coding workflow for Codex CLI
interface.longDescription: Use code-toolkit to drive agent work through brainstorming, plan-writing, subagent-driven development, TDD iron-law, systematic debugging, code review, verification-before-completion, and finish-branch — plus auxiliary parallel-dispatch when independent domains can run concurrently. Each rule grounded in primary sources (Beck 2002 TDD / Martin 2008 Clean Code / Hunt & Thomas 2019 Pragmatic Programmer / Martin 2000-2017 SOLID / Fowler 2018 Refactoring / Feathers 2004 Legacy Code / OWASP ASVS v5.0.0 / 徳丸本 第 2 版 Ch.6 encoding security). 11 skills total; full Superpowers parity at v0.3.0. Coexists with `domain-teams:code-team` (passive gate) and `dev-workflow:{git-memory, complexity-critique, proposal-critique}`. SessionStart hook auto-injects router; `CODE_TOOLKIT_MODE=off` disables for users running obra/superpowers concurrently.
defaultPrompt: Let's add a feature to this project.
I want to refactor this module.
